---
title: "MachineLearningAlpha"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown
```{r}
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(reticulate)
library(matrixStats)
use_condaenv("py3.8", required = TRUE)
#use_condaenv("r4.4_env", required = TRUE)
py_config()
```


```{python}
# unseen_case_analysis.py

# ----------------- Imports -----------------
import os
import pickle
import joblib
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.image as mpimg
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, recall_score, precision_score, f1_score, cohen_kappa_score, matthews_corrcoef, roc_auc_score

from sklearn.metrics import (
    roc_curve, auc, precision_recall_curve,
    confusion_matrix
)

from pycaret.classification import (
    load_model, predict_model, get_config,
    pull, create_model, save_model, setup
)

# ----------------- Configs -----------------
np.random.seed(42)
plt.rcParams['figure.dpi'] = 1200
plt.rcParams['savefig.dpi'] = 1200

colors = [
    "#4E79A7", "#A0CBE8", "#F28E2B", "#FFBE7D", "#59A14F", "#8CD17D",
    "#B6992D", "#F1CE63", "#499894", "#86BCB6", "#E15759", "#FF9D9A",
    "#79706E", "#BAB0AC", "#D37295"
]

model_ids = sorted([
    'ada', 'catboost', 'dt', 'et', 'gbc', 'knn', 'lda',
    'lightgbm', 'lr', 'nb', 'qda', 'rf', 'ridge', 'svm', 'xgboost'
])

# ----------------- Case Configs -----------------
case_map = {
    "Case_1_2": "alpha",
    "Case_2_2": "beta",
    "Case_3_2": "alpha_beta"
}

case_datasets = {
    "alpha": "../output_pickles/all_alpha_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled/all_alpha_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled.pkl",
    "beta": "../output_pickles/all_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled/all_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled.pkl",
    "alpha_beta": "../output_pickles/all_alpha_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled/all_alpha_beta_integrated_expr_labeled_interleaved_shuffled.pkl"
}

case_folders = ["../Case_1_2", "../Case_2_2", "../Case_3_2"]

# Ensure 'Results' folder exists
os.makedirs("Results", exist_ok=True)

# ----------------- Loop Through Each Case -----------------
for case_folder in case_folders:
    case_name = os.path.basename(case_folder)  # e.g., Case_1_1
    case_type = case_map[case_name]
    dataset_path = case_datasets[case_type]

    print(f"\n📂 Processing {case_name} ({case_type})")

    with open(dataset_path, "rb") as f:
        combined_data = pickle.load(f)

    data = pd.DataFrame(combined_data).rename(columns={'output': 'target'})
    folder=case_folder
    # Create output folders relative to current directory
    case_num = folder.split('/')[-1].replace('Case_', '')  # "1_1"
    out_folder = f"Results/1_unseen_dis_output_{case_type}_{case_num}"
    os.makedirs(out_folder, exist_ok=True)
    img_folder = os.path.join(out_folder, 'imgbest')
    curve_folder = os.path.join(out_folder, 'curve_data')
    os.makedirs(img_folder, exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs(curve_folder, exist_ok=True)

    # ----------------- Setup PyCaret -----------------
    clf = setup(
        data=data,
        target='target',
        fix_imbalance=True,
        fix_imbalance_method="SMOTE",
        train_size=0.8,
        session_id=123,normalize= True, 
        verbose=False, n_jobs=20
    )

    X_test = get_config('X_test')
    y_test = get_config('y_test')

    # ----------------- Identify Best Model -----------------
    model_summary_path = os.path.join(case_folder, "model_metrics_complete.xlsx")
    summary_df = pd.read_excel(model_summary_path, sheet_name="Model_Summary")
    best_model_row = summary_df.sort_values(by=['AUC', 'Accuracy'], ascending=False).iloc[0]
    best_model_name = best_model_row['Model']
    print(f"📌 Best model: {best_model_name}")

    # ----------------- ROC Curve -----------------
    combined_roc_data = pd.DataFrame()
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))

    for model_id, color in zip(model_ids, colors):
        try:
            model_path = os.path.join(case_folder, "bestmodel", f"{model_id}_model.pkl")
            model = load_model(model_path)

            try:
                y_scores = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]
            except AttributeError:
                y_scores = model.decision_function(X_test)

            fpr, tpr, _ = roc_curve(y_test, y_scores)
            roc_auc = auc(fpr, tpr)
            plt.plot(fpr, tpr, label=f'{model_id} (AUC = {roc_auc:.2f})', color=color)

            df = pd.DataFrame({'FPR': fpr, 'TPR': tpr})
            df['Model'] = model_id
            df.to_excel(f"{curve_folder}/roc_curve_{model_id}.xlsx", index=False)
            combined_roc_data = pd.concat([combined_roc_data, df], ignore_index=True)

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Skipping ROC for {model_id}: {e}")

    plt.plot([0, 1], [0, 1], 'k--')
    plt.xlabel('False Positive Rate')
    plt.ylabel('True Positive Rate')
    plt.title(f'{case_name} - ROC Curve')
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(f"{img_folder}/combined_roc_curve.png", dpi=600)
    plt.close()

    combined_roc_data.to_excel(f"{curve_folder}/combined_roc_curve.xlsx", index=False)

    # ----------------- Precision-Recall Curve -----------------
    combined_pr_data = pd.DataFrame()
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))

    for model_id, color in zip(model_ids, colors):
        try:
            model_path = os.path.join(case_folder, "bestmodel", f"{model_id}_model.pkl")
            model = load_model(model_path)

            try:
                y_scores = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]
            except AttributeError:
                y_scores = model.decision_function(X_test)

            precision, recall, _ = precision_recall_curve(y_test, y_scores)
            pr_auc = auc(recall, precision)
            plt.plot(recall, precision, label=f'{model_id} (PR AUC = {pr_auc:.2f})', color=color)

            df = pd.DataFrame({'Recall': recall, 'Precision': precision})
            df['Model'] = model_id
            df.to_excel(f"{curve_folder}/precision_recall_{model_id}.xlsx", index=False)
            combined_pr_data = pd.concat([combined_pr_data, df], ignore_index=True)

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Skipping PR for {model_id}: {e}")

    plt.xlabel('Recall')
    plt.ylabel('Precision')
    plt.title(f'{case_name} - Precision-Recall Curve')
    plt.legend()
    plt.grid(True)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(f"{img_folder}/combined_precision_recall_curve.png", dpi=600)
    plt.close()

    combined_pr_data.to_excel(f"{curve_folder}/combined_precision_recall.xlsx", index=False)

    
    
        # ----------------- Metrics Collection -----------------
    metrics_list = []
    for model_id in model_ids:  # loop over your trained models
        try:
            model_path = os.path.join(case_folder, "bestmodel", f"{model_id}_model.pkl")
            model = load_model(model_path)

            # Predictions
            y_pred = model.predict(X_test)
            y_scores = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1] if hasattr(model, "predict_proba") else model.decision_function(X_test)

            # Metrics
            acc = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)
            auc = roc_auc_score(y_test, y_scores)
            recall = recall_score(y_test, y_pred)
            precision = precision_score(y_test, y_pred)
            f1 = f1_score(y_test, y_pred)
            kappa = cohen_kappa_score(y_test, y_pred)
            mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_test, y_pred)

            metrics_list.append([model_id, acc, auc, recall, precision, f1, kappa, mcc])

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Skipping {model_id}: {e}")

    # Save metrics to Excel for this case
    metrics_df = pd.DataFrame(metrics_list, columns=["Model", "Accuracy", "AUC", "Recall", "Prec.", "F1", "Kappa", "MCC"])
    excel_out = os.path.join(f"{curve_folder}/unseen_model_metrics.xlsx")
    metrics_df.to_excel(excel_out, index=False)
    print(f"✅ Metrics saved to {excel_out}")


    
    
    # ----------------- Confusion Matrices -----------------
    num_cols = 3
    num_rows = -(-len(model_ids) // num_cols)
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(num_rows, num_cols, figsize=(15, 5 * num_rows))
    axes = axes.flatten()

    for idx, model_id in enumerate(model_ids):
        try:
            model_path = os.path.join(case_folder, "bestmodel", f"{model_id}_model.pkl")
            model = load_model(model_path)
            y_pred = model.predict(X_test)
            cm = confusion_matrix(y_test, y_pred)

            plt.figure(figsize=(6, 5))
            sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt='d', cmap='Blues', xticklabels=['Class 0', 'Class 1'], yticklabels=['Class 0', 'Class 1'])
            plt.title(f"{model_id} - Confusion Matrix")
            plt.xlabel("Predicted")
            plt.ylabel("True")
            filename = f"{img_folder}/{model_id}_confusion_matrix.jpg"
            plt.savefig(filename, dpi=600, format='jpg', bbox_inches='tight')
            plt.close()

            img = mpimg.imread(filename)
            axes[idx].imshow(img)
            axes[idx].axis('off')
            axes[idx].set_title(model_id)

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"⚠️ Confusion matrix error for {model_id}: {e}")

    # Remove empty axes
    for j in range(idx + 1, len(axes)):
        fig.delaxes(axes[j])

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(f"{img_folder}/combined_confusion_matrices.jpg", dpi=600)
    plt.close()

    print(f"✅ {case_name} complete. Output saved to {out_folder}\n")

print("🎯 All unseen case analyses complete.")

```
